CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(Record_Type_Name__c = "Complaint"), DATETIMEVALUE( TEXT( CASE( MOD(WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 1), 7), 7, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 3, /* Saturday → Monday */ 1, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2, /* Sunday → Monday */ DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 1 /* Weekday → next day */ ) ) & " 17:30:00" ), NULL )
CustomField.label: First Response Not Complaint Due
